# External ClickHouse Table

Declares a ClickHouse table as an observable external asset in Dagster. Use alongside `clickhouse_table_observation_sensor` for continuous health monitoring of row counts, disk size, active parts, and engine type.

## Required packages

```
clickhouse-connect>=0.6.0
```

<!-- FIELDS:START - auto-generated by tools/regen_readme_fields.py -->

## Fields

### Required

| Field | Type | Description |
|---|---|---|
| `asset_key` | `str` | Dagster asset key (e.g. 'clickhouse/analytics/events') |
| `database` | `str` | ClickHouse database name |
| `table` | `str` | ClickHouse table name |
| `host_env_var` | `str` | Env var with ClickHouse host |

### Connection

| Field | Type | Default | Description |
|---|---|---|---|
| `port` | `int` | `8443` | ClickHouse port |
| `username_env_var` | `str` | — | Env var with ClickHouse username |
| `password_env_var` | `str` | — | Env var with ClickHouse password |

### Catalog metadata

| Field | Type | Default | Description |
|---|---|---|---|
| `description` | `str` | — | Human-readable description |
| `group_name` | `str` | `"clickhouse"` | Dagster asset group name |
| `owners` | `list` | — | List of owner emails or team names |

### Partitions

| Field | Type | Default | Description |
|---|---|---|---|
| `partition_type` | `str` | — | Partition type: 'daily'\|'weekly'\|'monthly'\|'hourly'\|'static'\|'dynamic'\|'multi', or None for unpartitioned. |
| `partition_start` | `str` | — | ISO start date for time-based partition types (e.g. '2024-01-01'). |
| `partition_values` | `str` | — | Comma-separated values for static / multi partition types. |
| `partition_dimensions` | `List[Dict[str, Any]]` | — | Multi-axis partition spec; overrides flat fields when set. |

### Other

| Field | Type | Default | Description |
|---|---|---|---|
| `dynamic_partition_name` | `str` | — | Name for DynamicPartitionsDefinition (when partition_type='dynamic'). |

<!-- FIELDS:END -->

## Example YAML

```yaml
type: dagster_component_templates.ExternalClickHouseTableComponent
attributes:
  asset_key: clickhouse/analytics/events
  database: analytics
  table: events
  host_env_var: CLICKHOUSE_HOST
  password_env_var: CLICKHOUSE_PASSWORD
  group_name: clickhouse
```
